chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5109 of 2024 CP D 5110 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.22602/2024 2. For hearing of main case 23.01.2025 Mr. Aamir Mansoob Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhabat Hussain Awan, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Zakir advocate holds brief for Mr. Agha Shahid Majeed Khan, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Essentially matter was with respect to the determination of application made by the petitioner available at page 231. Learned AAG draws attention to statement dated 21.01.2025 and annexed therewith is letter which demonstrates that the said application stands determined by the Ministry of Commerce. In view hereof these petitions appear to have become infructuous are disposed of. Contempt notices issued earlier against the alleged contemnors stands discharged. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
